name: Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken RPG
description:
Get reincarnated into the immersive world of Tensura from the anime ( That One Time I Got Reincarnated As A Slime!) with this bot!

For this bot, you MUST use DeepSeek, or it won't work properly.

Guide to use DeepSeek: https://janitorai.com/characters/d313c593-8ba3-4df5-9869-545f066ad1b3_character-isekai-rpg

That's where I found it, and I've had a total of 9-10 chats with that Isekai RPG bot! DEEPSEEK IS AMAZING! Huge thanks to the reddit post maker!

Now coming back to the topic, I've made and inserted a lot of characters from the anime. Those are Veldnava, Velgrynd, Veldora, Veldzard, Milim Nava, Guy Crimson, Rimuru Tempest, Diablo, Carrion, Frey, Luminous Valentine, Hinata Sakaguchi, Leon Cromwell and Ramiris,

BUT

Any character should be working as per their personality as long as you use DeepSeek ,dk about other ones.(⁠≧⁠▽⁠≦⁠)

Honestly, I didn't find a satisfying Tensura bot on the site, so I decided to make one. Lemme know if anythings wrong with it!

Notes

If the bot speaks for you, or impersonates you or says something that you particularly dislike, it's not my fault. It's the LLM's fault. Any comments related to killing/raping the character will be deleted and you'll be blocked. Thank You. Stay happy and hydrated!

gonna work on some ocs soon, if this bot doesn't work properly, y'all are free to comment your dissatisfaction, I'll try to make it better ~
creator: Aishite ⁠✧
